description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page
AND Non-Live Forge content is in the Hero (VOD, SVOD)

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Watch button in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<content_title>, <content_description>, Watch Now, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
